name: Proactively
overview_text: Proactively is a comprehensive employee experience and engagement platform that empowers organizations to create a positive, inclusive work environment. Their AI-powered solution offers real-time feedback, analytics, and insights to help companies drive employee retention, boost productivity, and improve overall well-being.

Their AI-powered solution offers real-time feedback, analytics, and insights to help companies drive employee retention, boost productivity, and improve overall well-being.
